User asked: What should I do if Ludhiana is blocked
Assistant answered: If Ludhiana is blocked, act fast on Providence Textiles, Snow White Woollen Mills. Right now, Providence Textiles is the most exposed at 44/100. First, confirm dispatch status and ETA within the next few hours. Second, activate backup sourcing outside Ludhiana for yarn or textile inputs. Third, protect 5 to 7 days of buffer stock for critical orders. Fourth, shift shipments through alternate routing via nearby hubs if possible. Fifth, inform customers and internal production teams early so margin damage stays controlled.
